title: Purged
body:
![Purged text render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76d4ee4efc1f52bd343d449d09f621ae1ba53826.png)

## Get ready for the Purge...

**Ever wanted to conquer your SMP with brutal and overpowered weapons? Well, now you can, with Purged!** Purged adds new weapons alongside an armor set, which are great for purging anybody and anything standing in your way!

Forge **new weapons and armor** stronger than netherite using netherite and **ancient grim material**!

## New weapons:
- ### The Bloody Deacon
  A greatsword, possessing the ability to contain impact energy by **blocking incoming damage**, and release it in a **powerful dash**. Has +0.5 blocks of reach.
 
- ### The Fallen Shivangel
  A scythe that **pulls in hit entities upon hit** and can charge a **powerful vortex** powered by the screams of consumed souls. Has +1.0 blocks of reach.
  
- ### The Grim Shield
  A literal Uno Reverse shield, capable of **deflecting half the melee damage received**, and all projectiles back to their owners!

- ### New armor set
  Crafted in a smithing table with the new material, the **Grim Plate**, used as the template and the material.

- ### The Rib Cradle
  A new blade forged with the **withered bones** of Wither Skeletons, infused with the **withering properties**, inflicting it on impact.
##

### Brand-new structure
There's a new structure, **Soul Ruins**, that spawns in Soul Sand Valleys, and contains a new archaeology block, **Suspicious Soul Sand**, which can be brushed to get the new Grim Plates, alongside some other great loot, ranging from potion supplies to even netherite scraps!
##

### Other new things
Wither Skeletons now drop **Withered Bones** instead of normal bones, which can be crafted into the all-new **Withered Bone Blocks**, and used for different crafts.

This mod also adds a ton of **new building blocks**, like **Soulstone and all its variants**, new variations of **Bone Blocks** for both normal and withered bone blocks, and other new decorative blocks!

And to top it all off, there are **3 brand new music discs by Galexme**, all to be found in the Soul Ruins!

---

If you experience any issues, feel free to report them in our Discord server
